title: Richly Braised Argentinian Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring grapefruit juice and tender beef, perfect for a crowd, served in scallop shells for a unique presentation. This dish is a low-fat friendly option for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion, garlic, and red bell pepper to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the grapefruit juice, oregano, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven, where it will braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve the stew hot, spooned into scallop shells.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
